sections.title: Prior to starting Tale of the Righteous

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Lord Shiro Shayzien
lines.text: Can't talk right now citizen. I'm very busy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about yourself.

lines.speaker: Lord Shiro Shayzien
lines.text: Well citizen, you are speaking to Lord Shiro Shayzien. I am the ruler of Shayzien and the commander-in-chief of the Shayzien Army.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How long have you held this position?

lines.speaker: Lord Shiro Shayzien
lines.text: Since my father passed away four years ago. He was a good man who took the defence of Kourend very seriously. I have been working hard to continue his legacy.

lines.speaker: Lord Shiro Shayzien
lines.text: Anything else I can help you with citizen?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about Shayzien.

lines.speaker: Lord Shiro Shayzien
lines.text: Most citizens of Shayzien are part of the Shayzien Army in some form or other. We are responsible for defending Kourend against external and internal threats.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are the current threats against Kourend?

lines.speaker: Lord Shiro Shayzien
lines.text: Externally, we have recently being dealing with increased lizardman activity. We've also been keeping a close eye on Varlamore to the south, just in case they try anything.

lines.speaker: Lord Shiro Shayzien
lines.text: Internally, we have seen a rise in gang crime across the kingdom. It seems to be especially prevalent in Port Piscarilius.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do you tackle these issues?

lines.speaker: Lord Shiro Shayzien
lines.text: By doing what we do best citizen. There's no threat that can't be defeated by a Shayzien soldier with a sword in their hand.

lines.speaker: Lord Shiro Shayzien
lines.text: Anything else I can help you with citizen?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about your plans.

lines.speaker: Lord Shiro Shayzien
lines.text: Our war plans? I'm afraid most of that is confidential.

lines.speaker: Lord Shiro Shayzien
lines.text: What I can tell you is that our main focus right now is the lizardman threat. We've moved a great number of troops into the Kebos Lowlands to combat the issue.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is that going well?

lines.speaker: Lord Shiro Shayzien
lines.text: Absolutely, we've pushed the lizardmen back to the point where we're finally able to allow citizens such as yourself into the region.

lines.speaker: Lord Shiro Shayzien
lines.text: Anything else I can help you with citizen?

lines.speaker: Lord Shiro Shayzien
lines.text: Apart from the lizardman, we are also preparing to support the King in the hunt for his father's killer. Once we know who they are, they will face the full might of the Shayzien Army.

lines.speaker: Lord Shiro Shayzien
lines.text: Anything else I can help you with citizen?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Lord Shiro Shayzien
lines.text: Farewell citizen.

sections.title: If the player lost the memoir page before using it on the memoir

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Lord Shiro Shayzien
lines.text: Here citizen. Your reward for helping with the expedition.
